name: paknsave-price-tracker
description: Tracks PAK'nSAVE NZ shelf prices across your saved staples list and tells you when something jumps.
longDescription: Maintains a list of grocery items you buy regularly at PAK'nSAVE NZ. Reads price screenshots or in-app exports you provide on each shop and tracks the per-unit price over time. Flags price changes above your threshold, notes whether something is on special, and suggests when bulk-buy makes sense based on your shop frequency. Does not scrape PAK'nSAVE's site — you feed it the prices.
